info.title: Evolution V2 Layer
info.description: Pilot Status API Layer — Evolution V2. Base URL `https://pilotstatus.com.br/api/layer/evolution-v2`. Authenticate with the `apikey` header (your Pilot Status `ps_` key). Instance/session endpoints are NOT available through the layer.

apiKey.name: apikey
apiKey.description: Your Pilot Status API key (ps_...). Evolution GO also accepts `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.

post.description: Offers a voice or video call to a recipient number for a bounded ringing duration.

schema.description: Result of offering (placing) a call to a WhatsApp contact.

jid.description: WhatsApp JID of the callee the offer was placed to.

isVideo.description: Whether the offered call is a video call (false = audio only).

callDuration.description: Duration in seconds after which the call is automatically terminated.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone number in international format.

callDuration.description: How long the call rings, in seconds (1–15).

isVideo.description: `true` for a video call, `false` for voice.

post.description: Fetches the product catalog for a business WhatsApp number.

schema.description: Product catalog fetched from a WhatsApp Business account.

wuid.description: Resolved WhatsApp JID of the queried business number.

numberExists.description: Whether the queried number exists on WhatsApp.

isBusiness.description: Whether the number is a WhatsApp Business account.

catalogLength.description: Total number of products returned in the catalog array.

price.description: Price in the smallest currency unit (e.g. cents).

retailerId.description: Retailer-defined SKU / content id for the product.

isHidden.description: Whether the product is hidden from the storefront.

availability.description: Stock availability, e.g. 'in stock', 'limited availability', 'out of stock'.

imageUrls.description: Map of image size key to image URL.

reviewStatus.description: Map of review dimension to review status.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Business phone number whose catalog to fetch; defaults to the instance's own number.

limit.description: Maximum number of products to return.

post.description: Fetches the catalog collections for a business WhatsApp number.

schema.description: Product collections fetched from a WhatsApp Business account.

wuid.description: Resolved WhatsApp JID of the queried business number.

name.description: Display name associated with the queried number, if available.

numberExists.description: Whether the queried number exists on WhatsApp.

isBusiness.description: Whether the number is a WhatsApp Business account.

collectionsLength.description: Number of collections returned in the collections array.

price.description: Price in the smallest currency unit (e.g. cents).

isHidden.description: Whether the product is hidden from the storefront.

availability.description: Stock availability, e.g. 'in stock', 'out of stock'.

imageUrls.description: Map of image size key to image URL.

reviewStatus.description: Map of review dimension to review status.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Business phone number whose collections to fetch; defaults to the instance's own number.

limit.description: Maximum number of collections to return.

post.description: Checks whether one or more numbers are registered on WhatsApp.

schema.description: One entry per checked number (OnWhatsAppDto). Order includes users, groups and broadcast targets.

jid.description: Resolved WhatsApp JID for the number (user, group or broadcast).

exists.description: Whether the number is registered on WhatsApp.

number.description: The original number as supplied in the request.

name.description: Saved contact pushName or group subject, when available.

lid.description: LID marker/identifier when the JID is a LID (@lid) address.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

numbers.description: Array of numeric phone strings (E.164 without symbols) to verify.

post.description: Marks one or more messages as read (sends read receipts).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

readMessages.description: Array of message key objects to mark as read.

readMessages[].fromMe.description: Whether the message was sent by this number.

readMessages[].remoteJid.description: Chat JID the message belongs to.

post.description: Archives or unarchives a chat.

chatId.description: RemoteJid of the chat that was archived/unarchived.

archived.description: Whether the chat archive modification succeeded.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

lastMessage.description: Reference to the chat's last message.

lastMessage.messageTimestamp.description: Unix timestamp of the last message.

post.description: Marks a chat as unread.

chatId.description: RemoteJid of the chat that was marked unread.

markedChatUnread.description: Whether the chat was successfully marked as unread.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

lastMessage.description: Reference to the chat's last message.

lastMessage.messageTimestamp.description: Unix timestamp of the last message.

delete.description: Deletes a message for all participants in the chat.

schema.description: Baileys WAMessage returned from the revoke (delete) send; carries a protocolMessage of type REVOKE referencing the deleted message.

key.description: Message key of the revoke message.

remoteJid.description: Chat JID the revoke was sent to.

fromMe.description: Whether the revoke was sent by this account.

id.description: Message id of the revoke message.

participant.description: Group participant JID, present in group chats.

key.description: Key of the original message being revoked.

messageTimestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) of the revoke message.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

fromMe.description: Whether the message was sent by this number.

remoteJid.description: Chat JID the message belongs to.

post.description: Downloads a media message and returns it as a base64 string.

schema.description: Decoded media of a message returned as base64.

mediaType.description: Baileys media message type, e.g. imageMessage, videoMessage, audioMessage, documentMessage, stickerMessage.

caption.description: Caption of the media message, when present.

fileLength.description: Media byte length (as reported by WhatsApp, may be a numeric string).

height.description: Media height in pixels, when applicable.

width.description: Media width in pixels, when applicable.

mimetype.description: MIME type of the media (audio/mp4 when convertToMp4 requested for audio).

buffer.description: Raw buffer; null unless requested internally (getBuffer).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

message.description: Full message object, or an object carrying only `key` so it can be fetched.

convertToMp4.description: Convert the media to MP4 when applicable.

post.description: Edits the text of a message previously sent by this number.

schema.description: Baileys WAMessage returned from the edit send.

remoteJid.description: Chat JID the edited message was sent to.

fromMe.description: Whether the message was sent by this account.

id.description: Message id of the edit send.

message.description: Edited message payload (contains a protocolMessage of type MESSAGE_EDIT wrapping the new content).

conversation.description: New text content of the edited message.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient number / chat the message was sent to.

key.description: Key of the message to edit (`id`, `remoteJid`, `fromMe`).

post.description: Sends a presence indicator (typing, recording, etc.) to a chat.

presence.description: Presence state that was sent (e.g. composing, recording, paused, available, unavailable).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient number.

delay.description: Duration in milliseconds to keep the presence active.

post.description: Blocks or unblocks a contact.

block.description: Result of the block/unblock operation, e.g. "success".

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Contact number to block/unblock.

get.description: Returns the chat matching the given remote JID. Pass `remoteJid` as a required query parameter (e.g. `?remoteJid=5511999999999@s.whatsapp.net`); there is no request body.

schema.description: The stored Chat record for the given remoteJid, or null when no chat exists.

labels.description: Label ids applied to the chat.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when the chat was created.

unreadMessages.description: Count of unread messages in the chat.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

post.description: Searches stored contacts, optionally filtered by a `where` clause. Send an empty body to return all contacts.

schema.description: Stored contacts for the instance, each annotated with derived isGroup/isSaved/type flags.

profilePicUrl.description: URL of the contact profile picture.

isSaved.description: True when the contact has a pushName or profilePicUrl.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

post.description: Searches stored messages, optionally filtered by a `where` clause and limited by `limit`.

schema.description: Paginated stored messages for the instance.

pages.description: Total number of pages given the page size.

records.description: Messages on this page, ordered by messageTimestamp desc.

source.description: Originating device, e.g. android, ios, web.

MessageUpdate.description: Latest status updates for the message.

status.description: Delivery status, e.g. DELIVERY_ACK, READ, PENDING.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return.

post.description: Searches message delivery/read status updates, optionally filtered by a `where` clause and limited by `limit`.

schema.description: Stored MessageUpdate (delivery/read status) records for the instance.

keyId.description: Message key id the status refers to.

fromMe.description: Whether the message was sent by this account.

pollUpdates.description: Poll vote updates payload, when applicable.

status.description: Status value, e.g. PENDING, SERVER_ACK, DELIVERY_ACK, READ, DELETED.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return.

post.description: Returns stored chats, optionally filtered by a `where` clause. Send an empty body to return all chats.

schema.description: Chats for the instance with last-message summary and 24h service-window info, ordered by most recent activity.

id.description: Contact record id, or null when no contact is stored.

windowStart.description: ISO timestamp when the 24h window started.

windowExpires.description: ISO timestamp when the 24h window expires.

windowActive.description: Whether the 24h messaging window is currently open.

lastMessage.description: Trimmed last message of the chat (media bodies cleaned).

unreadCount.description: Number of unread messages in the chat.

isSaved.description: Whether a contact record exists for this chat.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

post.description: Creates a new WhatsApp group with a subject and an initial list of participants.

schema.description: Raw Baileys group metadata of the newly created group (returned by client.groupMetadata).

subjectOwner.description: JID of the participant who last set the subject.

subjectTime.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the subject was last set.

creation.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the group was created.

restrict.description: If true, only admins can edit group info.

announce.description: If true, only admins can send messages (announcement group).

isCommunity.description: Whether this group is a community parent.

isCommunityAnnounce.description: Whether this is a community announcement group.

joinApprovalMode.description: Whether new members require admin approval to join.

memberAddMode.description: Whether non-admin members are allowed to add participants.

ephemeralDuration.description: Disappearing-messages timer in seconds (0 when off).

linkedParent.description: JID of the linked community parent, when applicable.

admin.description: Admin role: 'superadmin', 'admin', or null for a regular member.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

participants.description: Phone numbers (digits only) to add as members.

profilePicture.description: URL of the group profile picture.

promoteParticipants.description: Promote the added participants to admins.

post.description: Changes the name/subject of an existing group.

schema.description: Acknowledgement that the group subject was updated.

update.description: Result of the operation; 'success' when the subject was updated.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

groupJid.description: Group JID (may also be sent as a `groupJid` query parameter).

post.description: Sets the group profile picture from an image URL.

schema.description: Acknowledgement that the group picture was updated.

update.description: Result of the operation; 'success' when the picture was updated.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

groupJid.description: Group JID (may also be sent as a `groupJid` query parameter).

image.description: URL of the new group picture.

post.description: Updates the group's description text.

schema.description: Acknowledgement that the group description was updated.

update.description: Result of the operation; 'success' when the description was updated.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

groupJid.description: Group JID (may also be sent as a `groupJid` query parameter).

get.description: Returns metadata for a single group. Pass the group JID as the `groupJid` query parameter (e.g. `?groupJid=120363000000000000@g.us`).

schema.description: Normalized metadata for a single group, including its profile picture URL.

subjectOwner.description: JID of the participant who last set the subject.

subjectTime.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the subject was last set.

pictureUrl.description: URL of the group profile picture, or null if none.

creation.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the group was created.

restrict.description: If true, only admins can edit group info.

announce.description: If true, only admins can send messages (announcement group).

isCommunity.description: Whether this group is a community parent.

isCommunityAnnounce.description: Whether this is a community announcement group.

linkedParent.description: JID of the linked community parent, when applicable.

admin.description: Admin role: 'superadmin', 'admin', or null for a regular member.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

get.description: Returns every group the number belongs to. The required `getParticipants` query parameter (`"true"` or `"false"`) controls whether each group's participant list is included.

schema.description: All groups the instance participates in. The 'participants' field is only present when the request is made with getParticipants=true.

subjectOwner.description: JID of the participant who last set the subject.

subjectTime.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the subject was last set.

pictureUrl.description: URL of the group profile picture, or null if none.

creation.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the group was created.

restrict.description: If true, only admins can edit group info.

announce.description: If true, only admins can send messages (announcement group).

isCommunity.description: Whether this group is a community parent.

isCommunityAnnounce.description: Whether this is a community announcement group.

linkedParent.description: JID of the linked community parent, when applicable.

admin.description: Admin role: 'superadmin', 'admin', or null for a regular member.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

get.description: Returns the participant list of a group. Pass the group JID as the `groupJid` query parameter.

schema.description: List of participants of a group, enriched with contact name and profile picture.

admin.description: Admin role: 'superadmin', 'admin', or null for a regular member.

name.description: Display/push name of the participant, or null if unknown.

imgUrl.description: Profile picture URL of the participant, or null if unavailable.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

get.description: Returns the current invite code/link for a group. Pass the group JID as the `groupJid` query parameter.

schema.description: Invite link and raw invite code for the group.

inviteCode.description: Raw invite code (path segment of the invite link).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

get.description: Returns the group information behind an invite code. Pass the code as the `inviteCode` query parameter (e.g. `?inviteCode=F1EX5QZxO181L3TMVP31gY`).

schema.description: Raw Baileys group metadata resolved from an invite code (client.groupGetInviteInfo).

subjectOwner.description: JID of the participant who last set the subject.

subjectTime.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the subject was last set.

creation.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the group was created.

restrict.description: If true, only admins can edit group info.

announce.description: If true, only admins can send messages (announcement group).

admin.description: Admin role: 'superadmin', 'admin', or null for a regular member.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

get.description: Joins a group using an invite code. Pass the code as the `inviteCode` query parameter.

schema.description: Result of accepting a group invite code.

accepted.description: True when the invite was accepted.

groupJid.description: JID of the group that was joined.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

post.description: Sends the group invite link to one or more phone numbers.

schema.description: Result of sending the group invite link to the provided numbers.

send.description: True when the invite message was dispatched to all numbers.

inviteUrl.description: The invite link that was sent.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

description.description: Message text sent alongside the invite.

numbers.description: Phone numbers (digits only) to send the invite to.

post.description: Revokes the current invite link and generates a new one.

schema.description: Result of revoking the current invite code; a new code is generated.

revoked.description: True when the previous invite code was revoked.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

groupJid.description: Group JID (may also be sent as a `groupJid` query parameter).

post.description: Adds, removes, promotes, or demotes group participants.

schema.description: Per-participant results of the add/remove/promote/demote operation (raw Baileys groupParticipantsUpdate output).

status.description: Result code for the participant, e.g. '200' on success or '403'/'408' on failure.

content.description: Raw binary node returned by WhatsApp for this participant (present on some responses).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

groupJid.description: Group JID (may also be sent as a `groupJid` query parameter).

participants.description: Phone numbers (digits only) to apply the action to.

post.description: Updates a group's messaging and editing permissions.

schema.description: Wrapper around the raw result of the group setting update (announcement / locked). The current Baileys client resolves without a body on success, so 'updateSetting' may be null.

updateSetting.description: Raw provider result of the setting change; null/empty on success in current Baileys versions.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

groupJid.description: Group JID (may also be sent as a `groupJid` query parameter).

post.description: Controls who is allowed to add new members to the group.

schema.description: Result of toggling whether non-admin members may add participants. NOTE: this endpoint is not implemented in the inspected source (no router/controller/service entry); shape follows the standard Evolution acknowledgement for a boolean-ish group setting action.

updateMemberAddMode.description: Result of the operation; 'success' when the member-add mode was updated.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

groupJid.description: Group JID (may also be sent as a `groupJid` query parameter).

post.description: Enables or disables disappearing messages for the group.

schema.description: Acknowledgement that the disappearing-messages timer was updated.

success.description: True when the ephemeral (disappearing messages) setting was applied.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

groupJid.description: Group JID (may also be sent as a `groupJid` query parameter).

delete.description: Removes the connected number from the group. Pass the group JID as the `groupJid` query parameter.

schema.description: Result of leaving the group.

groupJid.description: JID of the group that was left.

leave.description: True when the instance left the group.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

get.description: Returns all labels defined on the number identified by the `{instance}` path parameter (the number's display name).

schema.description: List of labels saved for the instance.

color.description: Label color code (WhatsApp palette index as string).

predefinedId.description: Identifier of the predefined WhatsApp label, when the label is one of the built-in defaults; null otherwise.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

post.description: Adds or removes a label on a chat for the number identified by the `{instance}` path parameter.

schema.description: Result of adding or removing a label from a chat. The boolean flag reflects the action performed: `add` is present for the add action, `remove` for the remove action.

numberJid.description: The WhatsApp JID of the chat the label was applied to or removed from.

labelId.description: The id of the label that was handled.

add.description: Present and true when the label was added to the chat (action = add).

remove.description: Present and true when the label was removed from the chat (action = remove).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone number in international format (non-empty).

labelId.description: Identifier of the label to apply or remove (non-empty).

post.description: Sends an approved WhatsApp template message to a recipient.

schema.description: Sent template message. Served by the Cloud API (Meta) channel; returns the persisted messageRaw envelope with the template rendered as a conversation preview.

key.description: Message key identifying the sent template message.

id.description: WhatsApp message id (wamid for Cloud API).

message.description: Rendered message content. Templates are stored as a conversation preview marked with the template name.

conversation.description: Template preview text in the form ▶️<template_name>◀️.

messageTimestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the message was accepted.

instanceId.description: Instance UUID that sent the message.

webhookUrl.description: Webhook URL configured for this instance (may be null).

source.description: Origin device; 'unknown' for Cloud API sends.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

webhookUrl.description: Optional per-message webhook URL for status callbacks.

post.description: Sends a plain text message, optionally with a link preview and mentions.

schema.description: Sent text message. Returns the persisted Baileys messageRaw envelope.

key.description: Message key identifying the sent message.

participant.description: Author JID when remoteJid is a group.

pushName.description: Display name of the sender ('Você' for own messages).

contextInfo.description: Baileys context info (quoted message, mentions, etc.); null when absent.

instanceId.description: Instance UUID that sent the message.

source.description: Origin device (web, android, ios, desktop, unknown).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

linkPreview.description: Whether to render a preview for URLs in the text.

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Sends an image, video, document, or audio file by public URL (base64 and multipart file upload are also supported).

schema.description: Sent media message (image, video or document). Returns the persisted Baileys messageRaw envelope; the message content key depends on the mediatype.

pushName.description: Sender display name ('Você' for own messages).

message.description: Media content. One of imageMessage / videoMessage / documentMessage is present according to the sent mediatype.

fileSha256.description: Base64 SHA-256 of the encrypted file.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

media.description: Public URL (or base64) of the media file.

caption.description: Caption text shown with the media.

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Sends a PTV (round video note) by public URL (base64 and multipart file upload are also supported).

schema.description: Sent video note (PTV — playable video message / round video). Returns the persisted Baileys messageRaw envelope.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

video.description: Public URL (or base64) of the video file.

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Sends a WhatsApp voice/PTT audio by public URL (base64 and multipart file upload are also supported).

schema.description: Sent voice audio (PTT). Returns the persisted Baileys messageRaw envelope.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

audio.description: Public URL (or base64) of the audio file.

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Publishes a status (story) as text or media by public URL (media file upload is also supported).

schema.description: Posted a status/story broadcast. Returns the persisted Baileys messageRaw envelope; remoteJid is 'status@broadcast'. The message content key depends on the status type (text/image/video/audio).

message.description: Status content. For a text status an extendedTextMessage is present.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

content.description: Status text, or the public URL of the media.

statusJidList.description: Recipient JIDs (numeric strings) allowed to see the status.

allContacts.description: Publish to all contacts instead of a JID list.

post.description: Sends a sticker by public URL (base64 and multipart file upload are also supported).

schema.description: Sent sticker message. Returns the persisted Baileys messageRaw envelope.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

sticker.description: Public URL (or base64) of the sticker image.

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Sends a geographic location pin with a name and address.

schema.description: Sent location message. Returns the persisted Baileys messageRaw envelope.

locationMessage.name: Praça da Sé
locationMessage.address: Praça da Sé, São Paulo - SP

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Sends one or more contact cards (vCards).

schema.description: Sent contact card(s). Returns the persisted Baileys messageRaw envelope. A single contact yields contactMessage; multiple contacts yield contactsArrayMessage.

contactMessage.description: Present when a single contact is sent.

contactsArrayMessage.description: Present when multiple contacts are sent.

contactMessage.vcard:
BEGIN:VCARD
VERSION:3.0
N:Maria Silva
FN:Maria Silva
ORG:Pilot Status;
item1.TEL;waid=5511988887777:+55 11 98888-7777
item1.X-ABLabel:Celular
END:VCARD

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

contact.description: Array of contact objects (see fields below).

post.description: Reacts to an existing message with an emoji.

schema.description: Sent an emoji reaction to an existing message. Returns the persisted Baileys messageRaw envelope containing a reactionMessage that points at the reacted message key.

key.description: Key of the reaction message itself.
Key of the message being reacted to.

text.description: Reaction emoji, or empty string to remove the reaction.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

post.description: Sends a poll with selectable options.

schema.description: Sent a poll. Returns the persisted Baileys messageRaw envelope containing a pollCreationMessage.

selectableOptionsCount.description: How many options a voter may select.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

selectableCount.description: How many options can be selected (0–10).

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Sends an interactive list message with sections and selectable rows.

schema.description: Sent an interactive list message. Returns the persisted Baileys messageRaw envelope containing a listMessage.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

footerText.description: Footer text shown below the list.

buttonText.description: Label of the button that opens the list.

sections.description: Array of section objects (see fields below).

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Sends an interactive buttons message. Each button `type` is one of `reply`, `copy`, `url`, `call`, `pix`.

schema.description: Sent an interactive buttons message. Returns the persisted Baileys messageRaw envelope containing an interactiveMessage with a nativeFlowMessage of buttons.

body.text:
*Confirme seu pedido*

Pedido #1234 no valor de R$ 49,90

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

buttons.description: Array of button objects (see fields below).

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Sends a carousel of cards, each with text, an optional thumbnail, and its own buttons.

schema.description: Sent a carousel message (multiple interactive cards). Returns the persisted Baileys messageRaw envelope containing an interactiveMessage with a carouselMessage of cards.

cards.description: Carousel cards, each an interactive message with header, body, footer and native flow buttons.

body.text:
*Produto A*

O mais vendido da semana

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

cards.description: Array of card objects (see fields below).

cards[].thumbnailUrl.description: URL of the card thumbnail image.

cards[].buttons.description: Buttons for the card (same shape as sendButtons).

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Fetches the profile picture URL of a WhatsApp contact.

wuid.description: WhatsApp JID resolved from the requested number.

profilePictureUrl.description: Public URL of the contact's profile picture, or null when hidden/not set or unreachable.

parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Phone number or JID whose profile picture URL to fetch.

post.description: Fetches the WhatsApp Business profile (category, description, email, website) of a number.

schema.description: WhatsApp Business profile. When the number is a business account isBusiness=true and the business fields are populated; otherwise isBusiness=false with the on-WhatsApp check fields.

isBusiness.description: Whether the number is a WhatsApp Business account.

jid.description: WhatsApp JID (present in the non-business branch, from the on-WhatsApp check).

exists.description: Whether the number exists on WhatsApp (present in the non-business branch).

message.description: Explanatory message when the number is not a business profile.

example.description: Official store — fast delivery across Brazil.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Phone number or JID of the business account to inspect.

post.description: Fetches the full profile (name, status, picture, business flag) of a contact.

numberExists.description: Whether the number exists on WhatsApp.

picture.description: Profile picture URL, or null when hidden/not set.

status.description: The contact's status/about text (or connection status for own profile).

isBusiness.description: Whether the profile is a WhatsApp Business account.

website.description: First business website URL (only for business profiles).

example.name: Acme Store

post.description: Sets the outbound proxy for the instance named in the `{instance}` path parameter.

schema.description: Confirmation that the instance proxy configuration was saved. Echoes the instance name and the proxy payload that was persisted.

instanceName.description: Name of the instance the proxy was applied to.

proxy.description: The proxy payload that was persisted. When disabled, the host/port/protocol/username/password fields are cleared to empty strings.

enabled.description: Whether the proxy is enabled for this instance.

host.description: Proxy host name or IP address.

protocol.description: Proxy protocol (e.g. http, https, socks4, socks5).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

enabled.description: Whether the proxy is enabled for this instance.

host.description: Proxy host name or IP address.

get.description: Returns the current proxy configuration for the instance named in the `{instance}` path parameter.

schema.description: The saved proxy record for the instance. Returns null when no proxy record exists.

id.description: Unique identifier of the proxy record (cuid).

enabled.description: Whether the proxy is enabled for this instance.

host.description: Proxy host name or IP address.

protocol.description: Proxy protocol (e.g. http, https, socks4, socks5).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the proxy record was created (ISO 8601).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the proxy record was last updated (ISO 8601).

instanceId.description: Identifier of the instance this proxy belongs to.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

post.description: Returns the stored media records for the instance, optionally filtered by the given fields.

schema.description: Array of stored media records for the instance (S3/MinIO integration). Each entry is a Prisma Media row with its related Message.

fileName.description: Object key / path of the file stored in the S3/MinIO bucket.

type.description: Media category (e.g. image, video, audio, document, sticker).

mimetype.description: MIME type of the stored file.

createdAt.description: Date the media record was created.

Message.description: The Message this media belongs to.

messageType.description: Type of message (e.g. imageMessage, videoMessage, audioMessage, documentMessage).

status.description: Delivery status (e.g. PENDING, SERVER_ACK, DELIVERY_ACK, READ).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

id.description: Media record identifier to filter by.

messageId.description: Message identifier the media belongs to.

post.description: Resolves a media record by `id` and returns a temporary presigned download URL along with the media metadata.

schema.description: A single media record plus a freshly generated presigned URL for downloading the object from S3/MinIO.

mediaUrl.description: Presigned URL to download the stored media object (valid for the requested expiry, in seconds).

fileName.description: Object key / path of the file stored in the S3/MinIO bucket.

type.description: Media category (e.g. image, video, audio, document, sticker).

mimetype.description: MIME type of the stored file.

createdAt.description: Date the media record was created.

Message.description: The Message this media belongs to.

messageType.description: Type of message (e.g. imageMessage, videoMessage, audioMessage, documentMessage).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

expiry.description: Lifetime of the presigned URL, in seconds (numeric string, e.g. `"3600"`).

post.description: Creates a new message template for the instance.

schema.description: The persisted template record. Evolution registers the template on the WhatsApp Business (Meta) API and stores the returned metadata locally, returning the saved DB row.

templateId.description: Meta message template id (HSM id) returned by the WhatsApp Business API.

template.description: Raw response object returned by the Meta message_templates create call.

status.description: Review status of the template (e.g. PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED).

webhookUrl.description: Optional webhook URL associated with the template.

instanceId.description: Id of the instance that owns the template.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

components.description: Template component objects (header, body, footer, buttons).

allowCategoryChange.description: Allow Meta to reassign the category during review.

webhookUrl.description: URL notified about template status changes.

post.description: Updates an existing template identified by its Meta template ID.

schema.description: Native response from the WhatsApp Business (Meta) API when editing an existing message template.

success.description: Whether the template edit was accepted by the WhatsApp Business API.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

allowCategoryChange.description: Allow Meta to reassign the category during review.

ttl.description: Time-to-live for authentication templates, in seconds.

example.text: Ola {{1}}, seu pedido {{2}} esta a caminho.

delete.description: Deletes a template by name (optionally scoped by its HSM ID).

schema.description: Native response from the WhatsApp Business (Meta) API when deleting a message template.

success.description: Whether the template was successfully deleted on the WhatsApp Business API.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

name.description: Name of the template to delete.

hsmId.description: Specific HSM/template ID to target a single language version.

get.description: Returns all templates registered for the instance. The instance display name is taken from the path.

schema.description: List of message templates for the instance's WhatsApp Business Account, as returned by the WhatsApp Business (Meta) API (the `data` array of the message_templates response).

components.description: Ordered list of template components (HEADER, BODY, FOOTER, BUTTONS).

format.description: Header format when type is HEADER (TEXT, IMAGE, VIDEO, DOCUMENT).

example.description: Example values used for template approval.

components.text: Olá {{1}}, seu pedido {{2}} foi confirmado e será enviado em breve.
